creator: gad@eclipse.acs.rpi.edu
text:
I heard back from Justin Mason, who used to do some work on PLP.
He says that no one has worked on it in years, and it is definitely
a dead project (superceded by LPRng), so we should remove any
references to it in favor of LPRng.

---
Garance Alistair Drosehn     =     gad@eclipse.acs.rpi.edu
Senior Systems Programmer        (MIME & NeXTmail capable)
Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute;           Troy NY    USA
